_comment: Portfolio review lifecycle. Realized as a pure transition function in pf.domain; the load-act-save loop runs in pf.app. Concurrency: two managers may review at once, so every state change is written through the commit overlay (committing/commitRetry/reverted) under a DuckDB optimistic version check; a conflicting write retries with backoff up to MaxRetries, then rolls back the in-memory transition and refuses. The overlay states are named for this domain (committing/commitRetry/reverted), not the persistence default, to show the pattern is not tied to any vocabulary.

_delays.COMMIT_TIMEOUT: 5000 ms - DuckDB write timeout before a commit attempt is treated as failed
_delays.RETRY_BACKOFF: ~200 ms exponential backoff between optimistic-lock retries

_ignores.reopen: reopen applies to decided portfolios only; a Proposed portfolio has not been decided

_ignores.advance: UnderReview is the last open stage; the next step is accept or reject
_ignores.reopen: reopen applies to decided portfolios only

_ignores.advance: Accepted is decided; it does not advance
_ignores.reject: a decided portfolio is not directly re-decided; reopen it first

_ignores.advance: Rejected is decided; it does not advance
_ignores.accept: a decided portfolio is not directly re-decided; reopen it first

reverted._exhaustive: prior is set by every setPending action to the review stage the operation departed from; its codomain is exactly the four PortfolioStatus values, so one guarded branch per stage is total
